content: We can frame Self-Refine’s single-perspective iterative improvement workflow as a weak baseline that can be augmented by the multiple inconsistent solving perspectives from LLM self-reflection mechanisms to create a multi-perspective iterative self-refinement framework that still requires no additional training or labeled data. This hybrid framework leverages the strengths of both approaches: it retains Self-Refine’s accessibility and lightweight structure while fixing its blind spot of getting stuck in local optima caused by the model’s consistent initial bias.
